title: Q3 Planning Meeting
body:
Meeting held in conference room A to align on Q3 priorities.

Action Items:
1. Follow up with marketing team on campaign timeline (Owner: Alice)
2. Review Q3 budget forecasts (Owner: Bob)
3. Draft project plan for new client onboarding (Owner: Alice)
4. Update sales deck (Owner: Charlie)
5. Compile Q2 performance metrics (Owner: Bob)

Next meeting scheduled for July 7.
